title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Pepperfry - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Pepperfry - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pepperfry. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Mumbai-based team.

About Pepperfry:
Pepperfry is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pepperfry!
